calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. (see also companion case #605692).
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. Joseph Wickstein.
Nancy Lenvin, Esq. for Plaintiff Profita Holding, NV. present by Arthur Swanson an authorized agent.
Sejal Patel and Susanne Geraghty, Esq. for Defendant Aldolfo Zarete also present.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation to be reduced to writting by Ms. Lenvin.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-02-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Nancy C. Lenvin, Esq., Browning, Wholey & Lenvin, 415-771-5245, for plaintiff and moving party Profita Holding.
Sejal Patel, Esq. and Susanne N. Geraghty, Esq., Pillsbury, Winthrop, LLP, 415-983-1000, for defendant and opposing party Aldolfo Zarate.
*A R G U E D and the Court took PLAINTIFF PROFITA HOLDING'S Motion For Summary Judgment -- under submission. (Consolidated with 605692) Reporter: Candice Yount, CSR #2737 (DEW/301/DR)
